name: Understanding Brinson Analysis as a Performance Attribution
snippet: Brinson analysis helps fund managers and investors attribute portfolio returns by breaking them down into allocation and selection effects.

name: Performance attribution
snippet:
. The three attribution terms (asset allocation, stock selection, and interaction) sum exactly to the active return. The Brinson model performance attribution ...
The three attribution terms (asset allocation, stock selection, and interaction) sum exactly to the active return without the need for any fudge factors. Some other versions of decision attribution analysis omit the interaction effect.

name: Brinson Attribution Model: Allocation, Selection & Interaction
snippet:
The Brinson attribution model decomposes portfolio active return into allocation, selection, and interaction effects.
The Brinson attribution model decomposes portfolio active return into allocation, selection, and interaction effects. Learn the BF and BHB formulas with a worked example.

name: Portfolio Performance Attribution: The Brinson-Fachler Model
snippet: This video covers everything you need to know about the brenson factor model when you're doing performance attribution on a portfolio.
